chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 244 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG files statement on behalf of official respondents, which is taken on record, copy whereof provided to Mr. Shamsuddin N.Kobhar, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Amanullah G. Malik, learned counsel for the Petitioner. In their statement, the official respondents have undertaken that no harassment would be caused to the Petitioner and protection will be provided to him in accordance with the law. On such statement and after going through the statement filed today, Counsel holding brief being satisfied under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is disposed of. Judge ARBROHI/PS
